name: getBalance
title: Get Balance
description: Get coin or token balance for an account. Returns balance in copper (1 CVM = 1,000,000,000 copper).

token.description: Token actor address for fungible token balance (e.g. '#128'). Omit or nil for native CVM coin.

balance.description: Balance amount (copper for CVM, token units for fungible tokens)

token.description: Token address if a fungible token was queried, null for CVM
